item.name: Rimepike
item.description:
A king among icepike, and lord of the waters of the Eblan Thaw.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Many an unsuspecting tooth has cracked upon this creature's scales, notorious for being harder than even the ice of the Eblan Rime. Simmering it for several hours, however, is said to have a transformative effect on the wavekin, allowing diners to masticate with molars intact.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
